object.description: Indicates this is a list response.

name.description: A descriptive name for the Organization. This field does not need to be unique.

id.description: Unique identifier of the organization domain.

verification_prefix.description: The prefix used in DNS verification.

verification_token.description: Validation token to be used in DNS TXT record.

verification_strategy.description: Strategy used to verify the domain.

metadata.description: Object containing [metadata](/authkit/metadata) key/value pairs associated with the Organization.

external_id.description: The external ID of the Organization.

stripe_customer_id.description: The Stripe customer ID of the Organization.

allow_profiles_outside_organization.description: Whether the Organization allows profiles outside of its managed domains.

data.description: The list of records for the current page.

before.description: An object ID that defines your place in the list. When the ID is not present, you are at the start of the list.

after.description: An object ID that defines your place in the list. When the ID is not present, you are at the end of the list.

list_metadata.description: Pagination cursors for navigating between pages of results.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
